diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,160 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Runtime, env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ./
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper, supports Node/Deno/Bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/headers, ../../utils/accept
+- Safe summary: Match Accept header for content type/language negotiation
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, accepts, defaultMatch, parseAccept
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/accept
+- Safe summary: Parse Accept header and return best match based on supported types or default
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ./types
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ./types
+- Safe summary: Connection info types for remote address and port
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Connection info interfaces with remote address details
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Read/write/delete cookies with support for signing and prefixes
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with class names and style injection for JSX
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, minify, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: none
+- Neighbor files: ./index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS utilities for class hashing, minification, and template string processing
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Inspect and display registered routes with handler names
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, initApp, createFactory, createMiddleware, Hono, HandlerResponse, MiddlewareHandler, HonoOptions
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory pattern handler/middleware builder supporting 1-10 handlers
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw, escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: Safe HTML string rendering with escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN, HTTPException, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests with header handling
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath, getPattern, splitRoutingPath, GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Get matched route info and path analysis for registered routes
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper with plugin system
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONOdisableSSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams
+- Reads as: ./types, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ./types, ./utils, ..
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for dynamic params generation and SSG context checking
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, createPool
+- Reads as: ./middleware, ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: ./middleware, ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: Core SSG engine with concurrent route fetching and file saving
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Safe summary: Streaming export hub for SSE, text, and generic streaming APIs
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, run
